title: Server-oriented deliberation cycle
changes: Add ServerOrientation for local orientation from GitHub artifact exchange.
Add SpecialistPreliminaryOpinion and RefinedSpecialistDemand for specialist navettes.
Add DeliberationRound and SpecialistBusStatistics for local passive supervision data.
Add FinalArtifactEnvelope for final-only artifact exchange after convergence.
Document GitHub as artifact exchange only, not the internal work surface.
guards: No Scheduler, Dispatcher, Queue, PolicyEngine, EventBus, or RouteRuntimeManager changes.
No GitHub client, network client, watcher, service, VisPy renderer, Qdrant client, OpenVINO runtime, PostgreSQL driver, or LLM SDK import.
Bus statistics are local observation material for supervision and future VisPy, not GitHub publication payload.
validation: PYTHONPATH=src:. python -m compileall -q src tests tools
